1782440.name: Tales from The Dancing Moon Demo
1782440.description:
Try out the demo to experience an early look at Tales from The Dancing Moon!


Tales from the Dancing Moon is a casual story-driven RPG that has elements of life-simulation, crafting, building and survival. All layered on top of a thread of mystery. Presented with a detailed isometric style, inspired by classic role-playing games.

You wake up to find yourself in a strange world. A local Innkeeper finds you and helps you make your way to the nearby village of Illisor – a ruined place that’s recovering from a recent attack of deadly shadow-beasts.

You spend your time at The Dancing Moon Inn where you assist the citizens in rebuilding their village. During your stay you discover that you weren’t the only stranger passing through this village recently. You begin to unravel the mystery that they left behind.

Will you discover your purpose here? And will you find a way back home?

  • Character customisation: Customisation options allow you to become whoever you wish to be in this story.
  • Story: Discover the lore of Illisor by interacting with NPCs, completing quests, forging relationships and reading notes and books scattered around the world.
  • Crafting and base-building: Flexible and robust object placement tools allow you build the medieval town you've always wanted to build.
  • Hone your skills: Skills like farming, crafting, fishing, and swordsmanship will help you complete the various tasks given to you in Illisor.
  • Photo-mode: Show off your town and other stunning photography skills with a free-camera mode with lens and filter options.
1782440.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
